name: CRM Meetings
description: Meeting management interface with calendar views, AI-generated recaps, transcription, and automatic action item extraction linked to CRM contacts and deals.

page_briefs.meetings: Weekly calendar view showing all scheduled meetings as time-blocked cards with attendee avatars, deal association, and meeting type badges. Supports drag-to-reschedule, click-to-create, and day/week/month toggle. Upcoming meetings show join-call buttons; past meetings display AI recap availability badges.
page_briefs.meeting-detail: Post-meeting detail page. A detail header shows meeting title, date, duration, attendees, and linked deal. Below, a timeline reconstructs the meeting flow with AI-generated topic segments, key discussion points, action items with assignees, and a searchable transcript. Each action item can be converted to a task or linked to a deal stage.
